THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT GABRIEL GUTIERREZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT OIL-DRI CORP. OF AMERICA IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT GABRIEL GUTIERREZ IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT OIL-DRI CORP. OF AMERICA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS A DEFENDANT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
